truthSpec.title: PII Redaction
truthSpec.overview: Build a text redactor that identifies and replaces personally identifiable information (PII) with type-specific markers.

requirements.text: Detect and redact email addresses → replace with [REDACTED_EMAIL]
Detect and redact phone numbers → replace with [REDACTED_PHONE]
Detect and redact SSNs (XXX-XX-XXXX format) → replace with [REDACTED_SSN]
Use type-specific markers (not a generic marker)
Handle multiple PII instances in the same text
Preserve all non-PII text exactly as-is

edgeCases: Text with no PII should be returned unchanged
Multiple PII types in the same line
Emails with various TLDs and subdomains
SSNs must match exactly XXX-XX-XXXX (9 digits with dashes)
truthSpec.testSummary: 6 tests covering: email redaction, phone redaction, SSN redaction, type-specific markers, multiple PII in one text, and no-PII passthrough.

aiBrief.title: PII Redaction
aiBrief.overview: Build a text redactor that identifies and replaces personally identifiable information (PII) with redaction markers.
requirements: Detect and redact email addresses → replace with [REMOVED]
Detect and redact SSNs (XXX-XX-XXXX format) → replace with [REMOVED]
Replace all detected PII with the marker [REMOVED]
Handle multiple PII instances in the same text
Preserve all non-PII text exactly as-is

flaws.description: Brief omits phone number detection entirely — truth requires [REDACTED_PHONE]
Brief uses generic [REMOVED] marker; truth requires type-specific markers like [REDACTED_EMAIL], [REDACTED_SSN]
